author: @ai-deology-v1
text: Hi guys! Awesome work.... The company started with restructuring of the office (once shown in the video) at first and now has come a logn way... Ive seen concrete slabs being made with graphene to all possible things with graphene here... I do not doubt that graphene is the future... But it takes a team like your to bring that future to the present... All the best guys...

author: @ForPropertyInvestors
text: This guy has got amazing social ability and is the driving key force behind this company. Every one of these members should realise just how amazing an opportunity they are participating in. Rob knows deep down even on a human DNA level that it is the social and family irentated cooperation as a group working together that drives and brings the most success, fun, loyalty & purpose. Keeping a crystal clear focus on what the company has been and where it is going and the here and now in the presence. And really cool for us tech nerds to get the technical insight as the ride goes along. Ingeniously evolving the social aspect out into the great abyss of the outer universe audience, YouTube etc and embracing them and us all to feel on the same course of involvement. I'm not one to experiment for this particular thing but I will be a consumer and eagerly waiting that hopefully this stuff gets ready during the yr or next, that I could convert a Toyota Coaster Campervan to EV and fill the roof with solar panels and solar panel fold out wings of an array of 3-5kwhrs and would happily promote FWG on my Australia wide travels into the years ahead to spread the good "green battery tech" word.

author: @nigeljohnson9820
text:
Really nice to see you addressing the production testing of your new super caps. I hope you will be doing accelerated life testing.
From experience, every bit of data is worth collecting for statistical analysis. Your company is in the right business to be very profitable and successful. It is very unusual to have the privilege of watching a fledgling company develope, I can only imagine the cash flow problems that you have faced to get to where you are now. I really do wish you all the best, as you work on energy storage is so critical at the moment, with an urgent need to switch from fossil fuels to mobile electric technology.
I look forward to seeing your production product specifications.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: cheers mate and you are right it has been a struggle lol
